Document:
# Heretic Rituals
Ritual Name Path Tier Components Description
Sacrifice N/A N/A Target's corpse Sacrifice your target (or another heretic) for knowledge points.
Phylactery of Damnation N/A N/A Blood, Beaker Gives you a cursed beaker capable of stealing blood from a distance for curses.
Feast of Owls N/A N/A Your soul Grants you five knowledge points, but locks you out of ascention.
Codex Cicatrix N/A N/A Book, Pen, organ or limb Creates the Codex Cicatrix, a book used for more effectively harvesting eldritch influences. Also acts as a focus.
Relentless Heartbeat N/A N/A Heart, Paper Grants you a new set of ritual targets, up to five.
Amber Focus N/A N/A Glass sheet, Eyes Grants you a focus that can be worn on the neck slot. Focuses let you cast advanced spells.
Living Heart N/A N/A Active Ability Locates your sacrifice targets, but is loud. Be careful about when you use it.
Cloak of Shadow N/A N/A Active Ability Hides your identity and makes you move faster, but your actions proceed slower. Can be removed by damage.
Nightwatcher's Secret Ash 0 Knife, Matchstick Creates an ashen blade. All blades penetrate armor, trigger marks, and can be used in hand to teleport away from danger.
Grasp of Ash Ash 0 Passive Ability Your grasp will burn the eyes of victims, temporarily blinding them.
Mark of Ash Ash 1 Passive Ability Your grasp will now apply the ashen mark, burning, dealing stamina damage, and hopping to a nearby target when activated.
Ashen Shift Ash 1 Active Ability Allows you to temporarily jaunt through walls. Has a very short range.
Volcano Blast Ash 2 Active Ability Fires a flaming beam to a nearby target, burning and setting them ablaze, if they do not extinguish themself, it will spead to others.
Mask of Madness Ash 2 Mask, Ash puddle, Lighter, Stun baton, Liver Creates an abyssal mask; a mask that causes insanity in heathens, and protects you from fire and heat. Heathens cannot remove it without help.
Fiery Blade Ash 3 Passive Ability Your blade now sets targets ablaze.
Nightwatcher's Rebirth Ash 3 Active Ability Extinguishes you, and intensifies nearby heathens flames, healing you for each victim.
Ashlord's Rite Ash 3 Three burning corpses !!!APOTHEOSIS!!!
Glimmer of Winter Void 0 Knife, Cold atmosphere Creates an void blade. All blades penetrate armor, trigger marks, and can be used in hand to teleport away from danger.
Grasp of Void Void 0 Passive Ability Your grasp will mute and chill victims. You become immune to cold temperatures.
Mark of Void Void 1 Passive Ability Your grasp will now apply the void mark, freezing, muting, and applying void chill your target when activated.
Void Phase Void 1 Active Ability Teleports you to the target destination, damaging and muting nearby creatures.
Void Prison Void 2 Active Ability Locks your target in a frozen ball, making them unable to act, speak, or be damaged. Applies a void chill when they thaw.
Void Pull Void 2 Active Ability Pulls nearby heathens towards you, knocking them over, disaming, and applying void chill to them.
Seeking Blade Void 3 Passive Ability Your blade now freezes and applies voic chill to enemies, as well as allowing you to teleport next to them by clicking them. You no longer need to breath.
Void Conduit Void 3 Active Ability Summons a void conduit that periodically pulses; breaking airlocks and windows, applying void chill to heathens, and brainting heretics immunity to low pressures.
Waltz at the End of Time Void 3 Three corpses in a cold atmosphere !!!APOTHEOSIS!!!
Blacksmith's Tale Rust 0 Knife, Trash Creates an rusty blade. All blades penetrate armor, trigger marks, and can be used in hand to teleport away from danger.
Grasp of Rust Rust 0 Passive Ability Your grasp can destroy most things non-living. It can also rust tiles under it to provide you regeneration, chem resistance, and stun resistance.
Mark of Rust Rust 1 Passive Ability Your grasp will now apply the rust mark, making victims vomit uncontrollably.
Aggressive Spread Rust 1 Active Ability Spreads rust in a large area around you.
Rust Construction Rust 2 Active Ability Raises a wall of rust out of any rusted tile, knocking heathens away.
Entropic Plume Rust 2 Active Ability Sends out a wave of rust, blinding, poisoning, and forcing anyone caught in it to attack nearby non-heretics. Also spreads rust.
Toxic Blade Rust 3 Passive Ability Your blade now deals toxic damage and rots corpses it hits. Additionall; your rust healing is stronger, and your grasp can now break reinforced walls.
Rust Charge Rust 3 Active Ability Charges from a rusted tile, rusting any tile you come across, desroying walls, and hurting people.
Rustbringers Oath Rust 3 Three rotten or silicon corpses !!!APOTHEOSIS!!!
A Steward's Secret Lock 0 Knife, Crowbar Creates an Key blade. All blades penetrate armor, trigger marks, and can be used in hand to teleport away from danger. This one acts as a fast crowbar.
Grasp of Lock Lock 0 Passive Ability Your grasp can unlock anything, but permanantly breaks the lock.
Key Keepers Burden Lock 1 Door, ID Card, Iron rod Creates a Eldritch Card, allows you to link two doors to be portals for heretics, but randomly teleport heathens. It can also absord access.
Concierge's Rite Lock 1 Crayon, Wooden plank, Multitool Creates a labyrinth handbook, a magic item that can materialize barricades that only you and the chaplain can pass.
Burgler's Finesse Lock 2 Active Ability An ability that steals a random item from the targets backpack and puts it into your hand.
Opening Blade Lock 3 Passive Ability Your blade is now better at wounding and can cause weeping avulsion on attack. Your grasp no longer goes on cooldown from opening locks.
Caretaker's Last Refuge Lock 3 Active Ability A spell that makes you transparant and not dense, you cannot harm or be harmed, except by anti-magic items.
Rustbringers Oath Lock 3 Three corpses with removed hearts !!!APOTHEOSIS!!!
Principal of Hunger Flesh 0 Knife, Blood Creates an Bloody blade. All blades penetrate armor, trigger marks, and can be used in hand to teleport away from danger.
Grasp of Flesh Flesh 0 Passive Ability Your grasp can raise the dead as loyal ghouls. Additionally you grow stronger from eating raw meat and organs, as well as become immune to poison.
Mark of Flesh Flesh 1 Passive Ability Your grasp will now apply the flesh mark, creating flesh clones of the victim that attack them when triggered.
Imperfect Ritual Flesh 1 Corpse, Muzzle Raises the corpse as a Voiceless Dead, a strong, but silent minion.
Knitting of Flesh Flesh 2 Active Ability Grants a spell that works as all surgical tools, heals minions, and provides health analysis and hud.
Raw Ritual Flesh 2 Eyes, Stomach, Blood Summons a raw prophet, an entity that can link your summons minds via the mansus link. It is also a stong scout and heals heretics and monsters around it.
Bleeding Steel Flesh 3 Passive Ability Your bloody blades now cause heavy bleeding on attack.
Lonely Ritual Flesh 3 Heart, Stomach, Lung, Pen Summons a flesh stalker, a strong combat summon with a jaunt and EMP.
Priest's Final Hymn Flesh 3 Four corpses !!!APOTHEOSIS!!!
The Cutting Edge Blade 0 Two Knives Creates an sundered blade. All blades penetrate armor, trigger marks, and can be used in hand to teleport away from danger.
Grasp of the Blade Blade 0 Passive Ability Your grasp will stun targets that are lying down or facing away from you.
Mark of the Blade Blade 1 Passive Ability Your grasp will now apply the blade mark, creating flying blades that protect you from attacks when active, throw with an empty hand to use then as a ranged attack.
Dance of the Brand Blade 1 Passive Ability Being attacked while holding a heretic blade triggers a riposte, knocking down your attacker. Triggers once per 20 seconds.
Sacraments of Power Blade 2 Active Ability Grants a spell grants total damage immunity and some damage reflect for 5 seconds, takes 1 second to start up. Cannot attack while active.
Stance of the Torn Champion Blade 2 Passive Ability You are now immune to delimbing, as well as resistant to bloodloss and slowdown. Grows stronger when under 50% health.
Empowered Blades Blade 3 Passive Ability You can attack with two blades at once, and using your grasp with blades inhand empoweres them.
Furious Steel Blade 3 Active Ability Summons three flying blades to protect you.
Maelstrom of Silver Blade 3 Four corpses !!!APOTHEOSIS!!!
Eternal Gate Cosmos 0 Knive, Glass sheet Creates a cosmic blade. All blades penetrate armor, trigger marks, and can be used in hand to teleport away from danger.
Grasp of Cosmos Cosmos 0 Passive Ability Your grasp will give a star mark and create a cosmic field where you stand. Cosmic fields speed you up and regenerate your stamina, and prevent starmarked from crossing.
Mark of Cosmos Cosmos 1 Passive Ability Your grasp will now apply the comsic mark, teleporting them to the location the mark was placed when activated, and stunning them.
Cosmic Rune Cosmos 1 Active Ability Creates two cosmic runes, allowing heretics to teleport between them and cursing heathens with a starmark.
Star Touch Cosmos 2 Active Ability Starmarks and links you to the victim, allowing you to stab them at range, and putting them to sleep if the link is unbroken.
Stance of the Torn Champion Cosmos 2 Passive Ability You are now immune to delimbing, as well as resistant to bloodloss and slowdown. Grows stronger when under 50% health.
Star Blast Cosmos 3 Active Ability Fires a slow projectile that raises cosmic fields where it goes, if recasted, teleports you to the orb and generates cosmic fields.
Cosmic Blade Cosmos 3 Passive Ability Your blade now starmarks victims, as well as chaining damage to other victims. Cosmic fields heavily upgraded.
Cosmic Expansion 2 Cosmos 3 Active Ability Creates a 5x5 cosmic field and starmarks nearby heathens.
Creator's Gift Cosmos 3 Three starmarked corpses !!!APOTHEOSIS!!!
Ritual of Knowledge Side 0 Four random items. Grants you four knowledge points.
Armorer's Ritual Side 1 Table, Gasmask Creates a strong armor that acts as a focus.
Ether of the Newborn Side 1 Vomit puddle, Glass shard Creates a single use potion that cures disease, wounds, and fully restores health, at the cost of a minute of sleep.
Void Cloak Side 1 Bedsheet, Glass shard, Winter coat Creates a weak armor that is invisible and provides space immunity while the hood is down, and a focus while the hood is up.
Ashen Eyes Side 1 Eyes, Glass shard, Flare Creates an eldritch medallion that provides thermal vision and acts as a focus.
Priest's Ritual Side 1 Glass shard, Water tank Creates a flask of eldritch essence, a potent healing mixture for heretics.
Rite of Stolen Faces Side 1 Knife, Heart, Clown or Mime mask Creates an Envy's Knife, a weapon that allows you to steal the appearance of whoever you stab.
Scorching Shark Side 1 Three Ash, Liver, Three Plasma Summons three fire sharks, fast but weak swarm monsters that ignite those who they bite and are resistant to fire.
Realignment Side 1 Active Ability Removes stuns, knockdowns, and handcuffs from you, as well as giving you resistance to stuns, temporarily makes you unable to attack.
Carving Knife Side 2 Knife, Glass shard, Paper Creates a carving knife, a knife that allows you to etch traps that activate when a heathen walks over them.
Codex Morbus Side 2 Codex Cicatrix, Corpse Creates a codex morbus, an upgraded and faster Codex Cicatrix that can curse other crewmembers.
Greaves of the Prophet Side 2 Magboots, Combat boots, Two Silver bars Creates a pair of armored greaves; shoes that act as no-slips, magboots, and jackboots.
Mawed Crucible Side 2 Table, Water talk Creates a mawed crucible; a cauldron that can brew potions, but must be refilled with bodyparts or organs.
Mysteries of Creation Side 2 Active Ability Summons a glacial spear, a throwing weapon that can freeze targets that it hits.
Through the Boundry Side 2 Two heretic blades, Two ID cards, and Two Bars of gold Creates a ragged sword, a melee weapon that inflicts targets with random marks and hits from a long range.
Rusted Ritual Side 2 Pool of Vomit, 15 Cable coil, 10 Sheets of steel Summons a rust walker, a creature that can spread rust and heals on it.
Shattered Ritual Side 2 Corpse, Latex gloves, Armor Summons a shattered risen, a creature that has high health and regeneration, but is too clumsy to use items or clothes.
Blood Cleave Side 3 Active Ability Causes heavy bleeding to targets in a moderate area.
Forest Abomination Side 3 Active Ability Upgrades most aspects of cloak of shadow, and spreads a disorianting fog wherever you go.
Mind Grasp Side 3 Active Ability Upgrades your Mansus grasp, it can now be channeled to effect everyone in a large area around you.
Space Phase Side 3 Active Ability A spell that allows you to move freely through space, can only be used in low pressure environments.
Maid in the Mirror Side 3 Five Glass, Jumpsuit, Lungs Summons a maid in the mirror, a dangerous creature that can freeze targets it hits and go incorporeal.
